regimeNotes: Macro leans risk-on but crypto-specific sentiment still in Extreme Fear — holding neutral until confirmation. DXY at 99.8 (USD materially weaker than 106+ prior levels; strong tailwind for gold, commodities, and crypto). EUR/USD at 1.1565 vs 1.08 at inception. T10Y2Y steepened to +0.50% (yield curve re-normalizing from -1.08% trough in 2023 = early-cycle signal). ISM Manufacturing PMI 54% in May (5th consecutive expansion month; highest since May 2022). VIX 19.25 (moderate). S&P 500 at 7,431, holding well. Fed on hold at 4.25-4.50%; cuts toward 3.0-3.25% still the base case. Crypto: F&G 18 (Extreme Fear), BTC dominance 56.64%, total mcap $2.28T (+0.11% 24h). BTC rangebound $62k-$64.5k, ETH down ~16% from recent levels. UPCOMING CATALYSTS this week: (1) US CPI Wednesday (consensus 4.2% y/y — beat would pressure Fed; miss is a green light for risk); (2) CLARITY Act on Senate calendar — major crypto regulatory catalyst; (3) Ethereum Glamsterdam upgrade expected June (gas fee cuts, MEV reforms); (4) 7 Fed speaker events. Cash at 23% provides full optionality. Posture: hold all positions, deploy into crypto/equities if CPI benign or CLARITY Act passes.

SPY.thesis: Core US beta into an easing cycle; S&P at 7,431 well-supported.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained break below ~$660 or hawkish Fed re-pricing.

MSFT.thesis: AI/cloud quality compounder, strong FCF; above $390 holding well.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex with no ROI; < ~$340.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality cash machine at fair value with AI optionality.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals; < ~$310.

UNH.thesis: Contrarian defensive value, durable earnings in a volatile healthcare environment.

TLT.thesis: Long duration to harvest Fed rate cuts; portfolio ballast vs. growth shocks.

GLD.thesis: Debasement + tail-risk hedge; DXY at 99.8 is an active tailwind for gold.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with strong USD reversal; < ~$350.

BTC.thesis: Accumulate into Extreme Fear (F&G 18); CLARITY Act is major near-term catalyst; dominant crypto asset.

ETH.thesis: Discounted L1 leader; Glamsterdam upgrade (June) and rotation optionality.

SOL.thesis: Small high-beta narrative satellite; showing relative strength this week.
